body:
* \[[`030413c8b3`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/030413c8b3)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **refactor(config)**: drop low-use internalPropertyName aliases (Ruben Bridgewater) [#8211](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8211)
* \[[`538b5746da`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/538b5746da)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **ci**: update all green to fail when the rate limit is reached (Roch Devost) [#8212](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8212)
* \[[`e1461827cb`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/e1461827cb)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **fix(dogstatsd)**: stop re-emitting stale gauges (Ruben Bridgewater) [#8153](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8153)
* \[[`ddfe085c82`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/ddfe085c82)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** add github workflow to mirror images from flaky registries (Roch Devost) [#8165](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8165)
* \[[`1709d32f57`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/1709d32f57)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **bench(spans)**: cover tags-and-otel construction shape (Ruben Bridgewater) [#8199](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8199)
* \[[`a72b441efe`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/a72b441efe)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **fix(propagation)**: improve baggage implementation (Ruben Bridgewater) [#8193](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8193)
* \[[`f1b085a703`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/f1b085a703)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **bench(llmobs)**: add writer flush benchmark (Ruben Bridgewater) [#8200](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8200)
* \[[`ce42131535`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/ce42131535)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **bench(aws-sdk)**: add inject and response-body benchmarks (Ruben Bridgewater) [#8201](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8201)
* \[[`35425f7a4e`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/35425f7a4e)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **bench(dsm)**: add Data Streams Monitoring pathway benchmark (Ruben Bridgewater) [#8202](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8202)
* \[[`b47fabe6d1`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/b47fabe6d1)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **bench(propagation)**: add extract and inject benchmarks (Ruben Bridgewater) [#8203](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8203)
* \[[`6e86edfcda`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/6e86edfcda)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **bench(encoding)**: cover native and legacy span-events paths (Ruben Bridgewater) [#8205](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8205)
* \[[`f6faa2b85f`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/f6faa2b85f)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **ci**: fix flakiness workflow falling back to default for empty branch (Roch Devost) [#8207](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8207)
* \[[`0421807fcf`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/0421807fcf)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **fix(llmobs)**: correlate otel gen\_ai spans with sdk llmobs spans (Zachary Groves) [#8127](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8127)
* \[[`63adfd5ae1`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/63adfd5ae1)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **bench**: add plugin-graphql-long sirun benchmark (Crystal Luc-Magloire) [#8089](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8089)
* \[[`26bee69994`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/26bee69994)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** minimize requests for all green script and retry faster (Roch Devost) [#8180](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8180)
* \[[`7763af7037`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/7763af7037)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **ci**: add days/branch/occurrences option to flakiness report (Roch Devost) [#8185](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8185)
* \[[`974bbce729`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/974bbce729)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **test**: add integration coverage harness (Ruben Bridgewater) [#8071](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8071)
* \[[`40c512422d`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/40c512422d)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **fix(test)**: use ALS run() instead of enterWith() in mock agent server.emit (William Conti) [#8166](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8166)
* \[[`8628c2716a`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/8628c2716a)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **fix(appsec)**: bound detectedSpecificEndpoints cache (Ruben Bridgewater) [#8163](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8163)
